allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project DownLoad/DownLoad.xcodeproj -scheme DownLoad -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' clean build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project DownLoad/DownLoad.xcodeproj -scheme DownLoad -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project DownLoad/DownLoad.xcodeproj -scheme DownLoad -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug test)
